{"problem_standardized_math":"Let $B$ be a positive definite matrix with eigenvalues $\\lambda_1,\\lambda_2,\\ldots,\\lambda_n$, where $0<\\lambda_1\\leq \\lambda_2\\leq \\cdots \\leq \\lambda_n$. If\n\\[\n\\psi(B)=\\operatorname{trace}(B)-\\ln(\\det(B)),\n\\]\nshow that\n\\[\n\\psi(B)=\\sum_{i=1}^n \\bigl(\\lambda_i-\\ln \\lambda_i\\bigr).\n\\]\nUse this representation to show that $\\psi(B)>0$."}
